info.description: A simple static site generator with an integrated toolchain for efficient development and delivery.

features.list: Recursively searches for files to build and output pages with hot-reloading
Uses a templating language to create reusable html components.
Uses a complete workflow of industry-leading software (Webpack, Browsersync, Autoprefixer, Babel, and more)
Includes pre-configured Webpack scripts implementing the latest performance optimizations
Starter template has a ~100% Lighthouse Score

info.tools: Node.js, Next-Gen JavaScript, EJS, JSON, HTML5, Sass, Webpack, Browsersync
